description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- User Management: Right-click context menu on search results (Edit, Disable/Enable, Move, Reset Password, Delete)
- Computer Management: Right-click context menu on search results (Disable/Enable, Move, Delete)
- Group Management: Right-click context menu on search results (Edit, Move, Delete)
- Create Single User: UPN Format now on main page next to Name Format with expanded options and “Same as Name Format” default
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- User Management, Computer Management, Group Management: Redesigned layout with left sidebar showing key details and action buttons
- Group Management: Members tab now lazy-loads when selected and resolves in batched LDAP queries instead of per-member
- Group Management: Member count displays instantly from raw member attribute
- Bulk Import Users: Home folder, profile path, and logon script now expand %username% before writing to AD
- Bulk Import Users: Automatically creates home folder on disk and grants user Full Control via SID (avoids translation errors)
- Save Template Dialog: Removed Username Format and UPN Format combos since they now live on the main page
- Create Single User: Name Format and UPN Format combos use custom control template with light grey background
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Computer Management: Sidebar Last Logon, DNS Host Name, Operating System, and OU now populate correctly
- Computer Management: Enable/Disable button text now toggles based on account state
- LDAP Connection Factory: Credentials are now shared across background threads (fixes User Management search and other operations on non-domain-joined machines)
